notes: Source: multiple LG regional product pages (SA, NZ, UK, US Solutions) cross-referenced with retailer specs. HDMI 2.0 grades are inferred from HDCP 2.2 support on a 4K display — not explicitly stated. DP 1.2 grade is inferred from HDCP 1.3 support. Power inlet (IEC C13) is inferred from included power cord accessory; not explicitly stated. USB count: official LG regional pages list 1x USB 2.0 Type A; some secondary sources (Newegg, Visionality) list 2x. RS232C uses a 4-pin 3.5mm phone/TRRS jack — closest connector in the schema is trs-3.5. The display is discontinued.

ports.name: HDMI 1
ports.note: HDCP 2.2/1.4; grade inferred from HDCP 2.2 support and 4K capability

ports.name: HDMI 2
ports.note: HDCP 2.2/1.4; grade inferred from HDCP 2.2 support and 4K capability

ports.name: DP In
ports.note: HDCP 2.2/1.3; DP 1.2 inferred from HDCP 1.3 support

ports.name: DP Out
ports.note: Daisy-chain output; version not explicitly stated

ports.name: RS232C In
ports.note: 4-pin 3.5mm phone jack (TRRS); used for RS-232C serial control; trs-3.5 is closest available connector type

ports.name: RS232C Out
ports.note: 4-pin 3.5mm phone jack (TRRS); used for RS-232C external control; trs-3.5 is closest available connector type

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: Ethernet LAN; speed not specified in source

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Built-in power supply, AC 100-240V 50/60Hz; IEC C13 inlet inferred — spec sheets do not explicitly state connector type but power cord is listed as included accessory, consistent with IEC C13
